Wiki / Daily special & streak

Daily special & login streak

Both introduced in v1.3, the Daily Special and login streak give you a fresh reason to open the game every day. Load the right flavor for a significant income bonus, and visit on consecutive days to collect an escalating cash reward on arrival.

Daily bonus

Daily Special

Each real-world calendar day, one of your unlocked flavors is designated the Daily Special. While that flavor is loaded in your blender it applies a +25% global income multiplier that stacks with all your other bonuses.

The Daily Special is picked deterministically from your unlocked flavor list using the current date as a seed, so it stays the same flavor for the entire day no matter how many times you reload. At midnight (local time) the date changes, a new flavor is chosen, and a toast notification appears on your next load announcing the new pick.

The Daily Special is distinct from the Featured Combo. The Featured Combo rewards you for having a specific pair of flavors active simultaneously; the Daily Special rewards you for loading a single designated flavor, regardless of what else is in the blender.

The +25% bonus only applies while the Daily Special flavor is currently loaded. If you swap it out for a different flavor, the multiplier drops immediately. Swap it back in and the bonus returns.

Consecutive visits

Login streak

Visiting on consecutive calendar days builds a login streak. Each time you open the game on a new day your streak advances by one, and you immediately receive a cash reward that grows with the streak.

The reward is calculated from your current income per second at the moment of login: roughly one minute of income per streak day, capped at a maximum of seven days' worth. A minimum of $100 is guaranteed regardless of how low your income is, so the reward is always meaningful even in the very early game. The exact formula is:

Streak day Reward (approximate)
Day 1~1 minute of income (min $100)
Day 2~2 minutes of income (min $100)
Day 3~3 minutes of income (min $100)
Day 4~4 minutes of income (min $100)
Day 5~5 minutes of income (min $100)
Day 6~6 minutes of income (min $100)
Day 7+~7 minutes of income (min $100) — maximum

The reward is added directly to your cash balance. A welcome-back toast appears roughly one second after the game loads, showing your current streak day and the exact dollar amount you received.

The streak tracks by real-world calendar date, not by hours elapsed. If you visited yesterday and visit again today, your streak advances. If you miss a day — meaning the last recorded visit was not yesterday — the streak resets to day 1 and you receive the day-1 reward only.

Because the reward scales with your current income per second, it is worth more the further you have progressed. A run with many employees and upgrades active will earn a much larger streak reward than an early-game run, so the feature stays relevant at every stage.
